ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indexing_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indexing provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the indexing provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of the indexing provider (e.g., Java, Python, Scratch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indexing provider */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details for the provider (e.g., path, exclusions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indexing_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indexing session */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indexing provider */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the indexing session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the indexing session */,
  "total_files_scanned" INTEGER /* Total number of files scanned */,
  "files_scheduled_for_indexing" INTEGER /* Number of files scheduled for indexing */,
  "files_fully_indexed" INTEGER /* Number of files fully indexed */,
  "double_scanned_skipped_files" INTEGER /* Number of files skipped due to double-scanning */,
  "scanning_time_ms" INTEGER /* Time taken for scanning in milliseconds */,
  "time_processing_up_to_date_files_ms" INTEGER /* Time taken for processing up-to-date files in milliseconds */,
  "time_updating_content_less_indexes_ms" INTEGER /* Time taken for updating content-less indexes in milliseconds */,
  "time_indexing_without_content_ms" INTEGER /* Time taken for indexing without content in milliseconds */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, failed, pending) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the session failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexing_sessions_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES indexing_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "project_path" TEXT /* Path to the project directory */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., Java, Python, Web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_providers" (
  "project_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-provider relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indexing provider */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details specific to the project-provider relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_providers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_providers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES indexing_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the user session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the user session */,
  "session_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in milliseconds */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project accessed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_performance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES indexing_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Time when the error occurred */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the error has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_errors_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES indexing_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES indexing_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., v1.0, v2.1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
